scripts.build: npm run build -w @qts/domain && npm run build -w @qts/extension && npm run build -w @qts/landing
scripts.check: npm run security:repo && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run security:bundle
scripts.release:chrome: npm run check && npm run zip && node scripts/prepare-chrome-store-package.mjs
scripts.release:chrome:update: npm version patch -w @qts/extension --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:chrome
